title: 平台规则：MEDIANAMA 平台规则变化
original_title: Anthropic calls for the ability to slow or pause frontier AI development
summary: Anthropic warns that AI is increasingly building better AI, raising the risk of recursive self-improvement—and urges coordinated action among developers and policymakers before societies lose meaningful oversight. The post Anthropic calls for the ability to slow or pause frontier AI development appeared first on MEDIANAMA .
topic_direction_description: Google 搜索、平台政策、开发者协议、账号限制、AI 内容规则和分发生态变化。重点看哪些规则会影响流量、账号、合规和后续变现。
